overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a horse-drawn carriage traveling through a snowy mountain wilderness. Two characters ride in a wooden carriage pulled by a horse, following a winding snow-covered trail through dense pine forests, alongside a frozen river, and ascending toward a high mountain pass with panoramic views of the distant range.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with towering peaks

agents.ego_description: traveling in a horse-drawn carriage along a snow-covered trail through the mountain valley

entered.detail: tall snow-capped rocky mountains forming the valley walls
dense evergreen trees covered in heavy snow
steep rock face with patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide snowy mountain valley with towering peaks visible in the distance. The carriage travels along a snow-covered trail flanked by dense snow-laden pine trees. The camera follows steadily from behind as the carriage moves through the pristine winter landscape.

events.description: carriage approaches and begins traveling alongside a partially frozen river

agents.ego_description: following the winding trail parallel to the frozen river, navigating gentle curves

entered.detail: partially frozen mountain stream with dark water visible between ice sheets

segments.scene_description: The carriage continues along the trail as a frozen river becomes visible on the right side. The path runs parallel to the waterway, with dense snow-covered pines lining the left bank. The valley remains enclosed by mountain peaks ahead while the river adds a new element to the winter scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain slope with rocky outcrops

events.description: carriage begins ascending steeper terrain, leaving the river behind
path narrows between large rocky outcrops and dense pine stands

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill through the snow-covered forest, navigating between rocks and trees

entered.detail: large boulders and rock formations emerging from the snow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the river behind, the carriage begins a steady ascent up the mountain slope. The trail becomes narrower and winds through dense forest with large rocky outcrops appearing on the sides. The terrain steepens as the carriage climbs higher into the snow-covered wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: high mountain pass with panoramic vistas

events.description: emerging from dense forest into open high-altitude pass with expansive views

agents.ego_description: reaching the mountain pass with expansive views of the distant mountain range

entered.detail: panoramic view of snow-covered mountains stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The carriage emerges from the dense forest into a wide-open high mountain pass. The view opens up to reveal a breathtaking panorama of distant snow-covered mountain ranges stretching to the horizon. The trail continues ascending through sparser tree coverage toward the summit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide snowy mountain valley that gradually opens to reveal a frozen river running alongside the trail. It begins by tracking a horse-drawn carriage from behind as it navigates a snow-covered path flanked by dense, snow-laden pine trees under the gaze of towering distant peaks. As the carriage continues its steady forward progress, the enclosed forest begins to give way to a more open landscape. The scene then shifts as a frozen river emerges on the right, with the trail now running parallel to the icy waterway while the mountains remain framed ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a carriage ascends from a sheltered forest trail into a vast, open mountain vista. It begins by leaving a river behind, climbing a narrowing path that winds through dense pine forests and past large rocky outcrops. As the terrain steepens and the carriage pushes higher into the snow-covered wilderness, the claustrophobic canopy of the woods gradually thins. The scene then opens abruptly as the carriage emerges from the trees into a wide high mountain pass, revealing a breathtaking panorama of distant snow-capped ranges stretching toward the horizon. Finally, the camera continues its ascent through sparser vegetation, moving steadily toward the summit under an expansive sky.
